name: quoteunquote-commerce
description: QuoteUnquote — 100% custom POD streetwear for Instagram-comment tees. Express API + vanilla frontend, avatar upload/crop, server-side 300 DPI print rendering, Stripe wallet checkout, Printify draft fulfillment.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check src/db.js && node --check src/sanitize.js && node --check src/printEngine.js && node --check src/printify.js && node --check src/capi.js && node --check src/notify.js && node --check src/config.js
scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log('\n[QuoteUnquote] Dependencies installed. Next: copy .env.example -> .env and fill in your secrets.\n')"
